---
# REQUIRED FIELDS
title: Clinician-informed explainable artificial intelligence evaluation checklist
  with metrics (CLIX-M) for AI-powered clinical decision support systems
acronym: CLIX-M
description: Studies reporting the development and evaluation phases of explainable
  artificial intelligence (AI) component in AI-powered CDSS development
doi: 10.1038/s41746-025-01764-2
pmid-id: '[40517152](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/40517152/)'
pmid-url: https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/40517152/
relevant-urls: |-
  [Read the full text](https://www.nature.com/articles/s41746-025-01764-2) of CLIX-M.

  The CLIX-M checklist is available in the [supplementary information.](https://static-content.springer.com/esm/art%3A10.1038%2Fs41746-025-01764-2/MediaObjects/41746_2025_1764_MOESM1_ESM.docx)
full-bibliographic-reference: 'Brankovic A, Cook D, Rahman J, Delaforce A, Li J, Magrabi
  F, Cabitza F, Coiera E, Bradford D. Clinician-informed XAI evaluation checklist
  with metrics (CLIX-M) for AI-powered clinical decision support systems. NPJ Digital
  Medicine. 2025; 8: 364.'


# OPTIONAL FIELDS
rg-language: English
explanation-and-elaboration-papers: ''
guideline-history: ''
relevant-more: ''
website-url: ''
additional-languages: ''
additional-information: ''
relevant-editorials: ''
primary-guideline: ''
other: ''
other-relevant-research: ''


# LIST FIELDS
study-design:
# - Animal pre-clinical research
- Artificial intelligence/Machine learning studies
# - Clinical practice guidelines
# - Clinical trials
- Diagnostic and prognostic studies
# - Economic evaluations
# - Experimental studies
# - Letters to the editor/Correspondence
# - Mixed methods studies
- Observational studies
# - Other
# - Patent landscapes
# - Qualitative research
# - Quality improvement studies
# - Reliability and agreement studies
# - Study protocols
# - Systematic reviews/Meta-analyses/Reviews/HTA/Overviews
# - No study design specified
clinical-specialty:
# - Allergy
# - Anaesthesia
# - Audiovestibular medicine
# - Behavioural medicine
# - Cardiovascular medicine
# - Complementary and alternative medicine
# - Dentistry
# - Dermatology
# - Emergency medicine
# - Gastroenterology
# - Genetics
# - Haematology
# - Health informatics
# - Hepatology
# - Infectious diseases
# - Medical education
# - Neurology
# - Nuclear medicine
# - Nutrition and dietetics
# - Obstetrics and gynaecology
# - Occupational therapy
# - Oncology
# - Ophthalmology
# - Paediatrics
# - Palliative care
# - Pathology
# - Pharmaceutical medicine
# - Physiotherapy
# - Primary care
# - Psychiatry
# - Psychology
# - Public health
# - Radiology
# - Rehabilitation medicine
# - Renal medicine
# - Respiratory medicine
# - Rheumatology
# - Sport and exercise medicine
# - Surgery
# - Toxicology
# - Tropical medicine
# - Urology
- No clinical specialty specified
report-section:
# - Abstract
# - Acknowledgements
# - Appendix
# - Biospecimen/bioresource information
# - Conference paper/abstract
# - Conflict of interest
# - Data
# - Ethical issues (consent etc.)
# - Figures/Graphs
# - Funding
# - Harms/adverse effects/safety data
# - Images
# - Intervention (exposure)
# - Narrative sections (discussion etc.)
# - Outcomes (variables)
# - Procedure/Method
# - Protocol-whole report
# - Research recommendations
# - Results
# - Statistical analysis plan-whole report
# - Statistical methods and analyses
# - Study characteristics (participants etc.)
# - Terminology/definitions
# - Title
- Whole report
# - No report section specified
keyword:
- No keywords provided

---

{{< include ../_template.qmd >}}
